# Thus Spoke Zarathustra

*[Nietzsche](../philosophers/nietzsche.md) · 1883*

A philosophical poem in narrative form, it stages the prophet Zarathustra proclaiming the overhuman, eternal recurrence, and faithfulness to the earth. It is Nietzsche's most literary and personal work.
